% Stable weekly-report shell. Weekly content lives only in report.yaml.
\documentclass[aspectratio=169]{beamer}

% Reuse the repository's shared style and bibliography.
\makeatletter
\def\input@path{{../}}
\makeatother
\usepackage[design=academic,bibresource=../refs.bib]{beamer-style}

% Generated by scripts/render_report.py. Do not edit generated files.
\input{generated/preamble.tex}

\begin{document}
\input{generated/content.tex}
\end{document}
